name: Easy Valve Balloon with Adapter
summary: The adapter for the EASY VALVE Balloon allows for easy attachment of new balloons, similar to the SOLID VALVE.
description: The adapter for the EASY VALVE Balloon allows for easy attachment of new balloons, similar to the SOLID VALVE. This accessory is essential for all Volcano lovers with the Hybrid or Classic models. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
